winner: I tried to hammer a flower into submission today. I gave it my best whack, but all I got was a bruised daisy and a very confused bee.

candidates.text: My neighbor is an excellent gardener—he can turn a hammer into a flower with just a few strokes, but I’m not sure why anyone would want to.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words in a creative and surprising way, but the humor is slightly forced and the punchline lacks clarity."}

candidates.text: Why did I get a hammer and a flower as a gift? Because my boss said, "You're a real hammer—you always hit your target—but you need to learn to be a bit more delicate with your work.

candidates.text: I told my wife she was drawing her hammer too hard and it would come out looking like a flower. She said, "That's not what I meant when I said 'hammer time.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words and has a mild twist, but the humor is weak and the setup feels forced."}

candidates.text: I was hammering a nail when I realized I'd just planted a flower instead of a nail.
